message:
feat(robot-cli): add NTM-compatible command aliases for common robot subcommands

Adds visible_aliases to the most frequently used robot subcommands so
agents familiar with NTM conventions can use either naming style:

  state    -> status, panes
  get-text -> read, tail
  send     -> inject, write
  wait-for -> await, watch
  search   -> find, grep
  events   -> event-log, eventlog

Updated help descriptions to mention available aliases, and added a
quick-start tip noting NTM-compat alias support. Includes parse tests
for all new aliases (status, read, inject, await, event-log) verifying
they correctly resolve to their canonical subcommand with proper
default argument values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
